name: Update & Upgrade Packages
description: Updates the local package index list and runs upgrades for all currently installed Termux applications and core packages.

name: Setup Shared Storage Permission
description: Requests Android shared filesystem permission to allow Termux to read and write directly to your phone's interior storage directories (~/storage).

name: Select Mirror Repositories
description: Opens an interactive menu allowing you to choose alternative network mirrors. Highly useful for resolving slow server speeds or build sync failures.

name: Add Root Repository
description: Enables the optional root suite repository, providing specialized low-level utilities designed specifically for rooted Android handsets.

name: Add Graphical X11 Repository
description: Syncs the graphic environment repository containing custom visual interfaces, windows managers, and X11 terminal extensions.

name: Git Version Controller
description: Installs the standard Git package to let you clone, push, and manage code repositories directly on your mobile system.

name: Python 3 Runtime
description: Installs the full Python programming language interpreter suite along with the package manager (pip).

name: Node.js Engine
description: Installs the server-side JavaScript engine runtime along with npm (Node Package Manager) for downloading JS libraries.

name: PHP Interpreter
description: Installs the hypertext processor command-line environment and engine for running local PHP scripts or web servers.

name: cURL Utility
description: A terminal core utility to transfer data to and from network servers using HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, and other major protocols.

name: Wget Downloader
description: A highly robust command-line background file downloader supporting recursive mirroring, pauses, and proxy systems.

name: Nano Terminal Editor
description: A simple, friendly, easy-to-use CLI text editor. Highly recommended for absolute terminal beginners.

name: Vim Advanced Editor
description: An optimized, highly keyboard-driven developer text editor loaded with customizable plugins and text buffers.

name: JQ JSON Processor
description: A high-performance command line processor used to filter, format, parse, and transform raw JSON datasets dynamically.

name: FFmpeg Transcoder
description: A powerful multi-media toolkit used to convert, mux, compile, compress, stream, and process raw audio and video streams.

name: Tree Directory Lister
description: Lists contents of folders recursively, forming a visually satisfying nesting layout with folder lines in your dashboard.

name: ZIP Compressor
description: The classical ZIP tool executable used to package, compress, and bundle sets of directories into compact portable archives.

name: ZIP Decompressor
description: Decompresses standard .zip formats, yielding visual extraction listings of local file components directly.

name: TAR Console Archiver
description: Saves and extracts standard file aggregates in consolidated Unix tape archive (.tar, .tar.gz) packages.

name: OpenSSH Secure Shell
description: Enables encrypted remote shell control connections, installing ssh client utilities and localized sshd listening daemons.

name: TMUX Terminal Multiplexer
description: Allows nesting multiple terminal panes and persistent session histories. Sessions remain alive even when App windows close.

name: Rsync Sync Agent
description: A high-speed incremental file synchronization program, updating and mirroring files over local and remote tunnels.

name: GNU Make Compiler Tool
description: A software compilation utility that automatically determines which parts of a complex C/C++ script need compiling.

name: Clang Binary Compiler
description: A premium front-end compiler engine designed to build fast native C, C++, and Objective-C binary software programs.

name: Htop System Monitor
description: An interactive real-time system process monitoring dashboard showing RAM, cores, processes, and terminal system health.

name: NCDU Storage Analyzer
description: An elegant terminal-based disk storage space analyzer. Visually tracks which nested folders consume memory resources.

name: Find Binary Path
description: Accepts program commands and prints their precise absolute location in the path folder setup (e.g., /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/python).

name: Manual Help Pages
description: Installs helper offline manual libraries and instructions. Call 'man commandname' inside terminals to read instructions.

name: BC Advanced Calculator
description: A standard CLI math language processing system supporting multi-decimal high-precision algebraic calculations.

name: GNU Core utilities
description: Provides standard GNU baseline operations like cp, mv, ls, rm, whoami, pwd, and standard terminal operating utilities.

name: GNU Find utilities
description: Provides powerful background searching scripts like find, locate, and xargs to query files dynamically based on expressions.

name: GNU Diff utilities
description: Enables clear local file comparison utilities. Includes visual comparative utilities like diff, sdiff, and cmp.

name: Upgrade Pip Manager
description: Fetches and replaces the standard Python installer system with its absolute latest online build to resolve install failures.

name: Requests Library
description: The standard Python library used to interactively trigger HTTP networks, APIs, head headers, and read raw request bodies.

name: BeautifulSoup Parsing
description: A framework to parse and explore XML and HTML files, enabling easy web scraping data processing.

name: NumPy Toolkit
description: Essential Python multi-dimensional array processing utility containing scientific math matrices operations.

name: Pandas Framework
description: Data exploration database structure toolkit supplying powerful data frames and analytical structures.

name: Flask App Framework
description: Lightweight WSGI Python micro-architecture used to spin up swift local web servers and API endpoints easily.

name: Rich Formatting
description: Renders beautiful colorful text, visual tables, loading bars, styled boxes, and custom formatting inside CLI outputs.

name: Typer CLI Builder
description: A premium library for building awesome CLI apps using Python 3 type hinting. Simplifies terminal argument queries.

name: Official Termux Packages
description: The central repository containing compiler receipts for building and packaging apps for the official Termux software suite.
warning: Always review source build scripts carefully before launching compilation tasks locally.

name: Official Termux Core App
description: The central source repository of the main Terminal emulator application for Android, containing Java frameworks and terminal screen drawers.
warning: Ensure you verify digital APK signatures of experimental builds before installing.

name: Termux Core API Services
description: Exposes core Android functionality (Camera, Speech, Vibrator, Contacts, Battery) to standard bash scripts. Needs companion Termux:API Play/F-Droid app.
warning: Ensure custom fork repositories correspond to trusted authors.

name: PRoot Linux Distros Installer
description: Manages installation of standard rootless Linux environments (Ubuntu, Debian, Fedora, Arch) on top of the Termux emulator.
warning: Requires standard network bandwidth to download third-party image containers.

name: Termux Graphic X11 App
description: High-performance graphic processing server environment displaying desktop windows at accelerated speeds on modern devices.
warning: Needs manual client setup and terminal server commands to visual start.

name: Premium Termux Customizer
description: A popular customized environment shell config incorporating Zsh, custom font pairings, themes, and styled greetings.
warning: Review external installation scripts before letting them overwrite your local Zsh rc files.

name: Netcat OpenBSD Utility
description: An open source, robust utility to read, write, check ports, bind backdoors, and route arbitrary network datagrams over TCP/UDP.
warning: Only use on systems and networks you own or have permission to test.

name: WHOIS Registrar Finder
description: Directly queries WHOIS databases to inspect registrar registry records, registration timelines, and public host names.
warning: Ensure searches remain compliant with registrar querying rate limits.

name: DNS utilities (Dig, nslookup)
description: Installs advanced domain name system lookup binaries (dig, host, nslookup) used to audit A, MX, TXT, and CNAME records.
warning: Be professional and audit networks lawfully.

name: Traceroute Route Auditor
description: Traces and measures diagnostic network hop delay durations across servers to analyze internet routing pathways.
warning: Fails on network routing structures filtering diagnostic ping requests.

name: Tcpdump Sniffing Utility
description: A high-efficacy raw packet capturing pipeline tool enabling active networking inspection directly within console output.
warning: Requires administrative root configurations on raw Android devices to sniff hardware interfaces.

name: Nmap Vulnerability Mapper
description: An industry-expert remote vulnerability auditor. Safely scans servers, lists open ports, operating software banners, and os types.
warning: Unauthorized querying of remote network servers is strictly forbidden.

name: Terminal OSINT Pre-requisites
description: Installs the primary package foundations (Git client + Python 3 runtime) necessary to explore open source forensic intelligence tools.

name: Format Parsers (Curl, Jq, Wget)
description: Provides data ingestion layers allowing command line download of public API fields and parsing nested JSON databases.

name: Diagnostics Suite Installer
command: pkg install curl wget jq whois dnsutils -y
description: Installs a complete, diagnostic information aggregation utility package containing curl, wget, jq, whois, and dig.
warning: Always respect the guidelines and targets set by authorized learning labs.

name: Security Labs Base packages
command: pkg install python git curl openssh -y
description: Installs python, git client, curl network utility, and standard OpenSSH dependencies supporting educational secure protocol learning.
warning: Testing on remote targets is strictly prohibited. Authorized configurations/environments only.

name: Moon Buggy Retro Game
description: Hop over lunar crevices inside this classic arcade ASCII side scroller directly in your console window.
howToPlay: Trigger 'moon-buggy' in terminal. Press SPACEBAR to hop.

name: NSnake Terminal Snake
description: Immersive cursor-driven Snake game inside standard console grids incorporating custom levels and speeds.
howToPlay: Trigger 'nsnake' inside shell. Control the snake with directional arrow keys.

name: CMatrix Falling Text
description: Transform your console screen into the classic falling green matrix. Extremely popular and highly satisfying.
howToPlay: Trigger 'cmatrix' in dashboard. Exit with CTRL+C.

name: Check Python Interpreter Version
description: Triggers python interpreter diagnostics. Assures it is loaded and correctly compiled.

name: Check Git Client Version
description: Outputs current Git version and helps verify the git repository suite is working.

name: Check Node Engine Version
description: Queries node compiler version to log node installation path diagnostics.
